policy: Public release is blocked unless every observed source is explicitly approved.

argotario.notes: The upstream README explicitly places the English argument data under CC0.

logical_fallacy_detection_intermediate.notes: Aggregated quiz-derived text has no clear redistribution grant; exclude from public release.

mafalda_gold.notes: Repository contains no license file or explicit redistribution grant.
